steps.title: Identify the limiting signal
steps.content: The phrase This approach has some limits— immediately signals that the underlined text will explain one of those limits.

steps.title: Match the specific flaw to the choices
steps.content:
The underlined text identifies a specific weakness in the data: Places API restricts coverage to customer-facing places.

The other three either discuss unrelated elements (A's neighborhood boundaries), misattribute the function (B's emphasis on utility), or describe a prior part of the passage (C's model introduction).

That matches choice D — D is correct.
